hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, when the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) range is between 0.5x and 2.0x ATR(14), a London-session (07:00-10:00 UTC) close beyond the range by >= 0.5x ATR with body >= 1.0x ATR leads to continuation that achieves >= 1.5R within 20 bars more often than random, yielding PF > 2.0.

entry_rules.long: Within trade window, first close above Asia-range-high by >= 0.5*ATR14 with candle body >= 1.0*ATR14, and regime filter true; only first breakout per day.
entry_rules.short: Mirror: first close below Asia-range-low by >= 0.5*ATR14 with body >= 1.0*ATR14.

exit_rules.stop_loss: 0.75 * ATR(14) from entry, placed on opposite side of breakout candle

notes: Inspired by LVC scout card; strict single-entry-per-day to avoid chop.
